headline: Domain Overview · macro KPIs
standfirst: From the Semrush AE database for cmsfinancial.ae. April and May 2026 cleared the technical foundation (Tasks 1–7: title tags, meta descriptions, H1s, internal/external link cleanup, ALT attributes, robots.txt). June 4 deployed Task 18 — AI Search FAQ on 8 commercial pages plus Yoast Organization graph enrichment with the CMA licence stack. Authority Score sits at 8 on a 100-point scale: a starting floor that the link-building plan in chapter 06 is designed to lift.
summary_lead: Aggregated macro KPIs for cmsfinancial.ae across the April–June engagement window. Technical foundation cleared. Organic keywords climbed 35→36 (+2.9%), AI Search readiness deployed on 8 commercial pages, and the Yoast Organization graph now broadcasts both CMA licences (20200000144 + 20200000223) on every page. Authority Score and the off-page link profile are the next-cycle priorities — chapter 06 carries the plan.

win_tiles.label: Organic keywords lift
win_tiles.tip: Keywords cmsfinancial.ae ranks for in Google's free results in the UAE database. Up from 35 to 36. New keywords entering the index after the technical foundation deploy is the first sign Google has processed the meta-description and H1 work.

win_tiles.label: Authority Score · baseline
win_tiles.tip: Semrush's domain strength score (0-100). Higher is better. AS of 8 reflects a young off-page profile: many low-quality referring domains and no editorial campaign yet. Lifting this is the central work of chapters 04 + 06.

win_tiles.label: AI Search FAQ eligible
win_tiles.tip: Visible FAQ accordions plus FAQPage JSON-LD schema deployed on 8 commercial pages (forex, commodities, indices, stocks, MT5, account-comparison, regulated, homepage). 52 Q&As total. Eligible for FAQ rich results and Perplexity / ChatGPT citation.

win_tiles.label: Yoast Org enrichment
win_tiles.tip: Yoast Organization graph now carries both CMA licences (20200000144 + 20200000223), DED registration 561501, the FinancialService @type, GCC areaServed, 8 awards, Business Bay address. Major E-E-A-T signal for YMYL finance queries.

win_tiles.label: SpeakableSpecification
win_tiles.tip: Voice-readable markup on the homepage targeting the H1 and FAQ Q&As. Lets Google Assistant and Siri read out the brand pitch and the most common questions cleanly.

win_tiles.label: Organic share of appearances
win_tiles.tip: Every cmsfinancial.ae ranking shows up as a standard text result. Zero pickup in AI Overviews so far — the Task 18 schema deploy is the first move to change that.

compare_hero.title: Organic keywords ranking in UAE Google
compare_hero.subtitle: The leading indicator. New keyword entry precedes traffic lift.
compare_hero.caption: The +2.9% week-over-week is small in absolute terms but directionally significant. New keywords entering the index is how foundation work first shows up in Semrush. The next meaningful re-measurement opens once Google's 28-day reindex closes on the June 4 schema deploy.

deliverables.title: What shipped during the period
deliverables.subtitle: Verifiable on the live site — every item below moved from absent or pre-engagement state to deployed during Apr–Jun 2026

rows.why: 30 pages had duplicate or oversized title tags. Each now carries a unique, focused title under 60 characters. Eliminates SERP cannibalization between similar pages.
44 pages were missing meta descriptions when first audited. One remaining in current crawl. New descriptions follow Yoast's 120–156 char window with the primary keyword in the first 60 chars.
35 pages had no H1 or duplicated H1. Each now carries a single semantic H1 matching the page's primary intent.
46 internal links pointed at 404 URLs. All redirected to live equivalents or removed. Stops link equity from leaking into dead ends.
37 external links pointed at expired or non-existent destinations. Each replaced with a working equivalent or removed.
30 images had no ALT text. Each now has a descriptive ALT used by screen readers and image search.
robots.txt now declares the XML sitemap so crawlers find it on first visit. Removes the dependency on submission via Search Console.

rows.metric: Pages with AI Search FAQ + schema
rows.why: Visible FAQ sections (52 Q&As) plus FAQPage JSON-LD on the 8 commercial pages. Yoast Organization graph enriched with CMA licences, DED registration, FinancialService type, 8 awards, GCC areaServed. SpeakableSpecification added to homepage.
Two pages had near-duplicate body content. Rewrites moved each to a distinct topical focus.
Three previously blocked pages should be indexable. Robots and noindex tags cleaned up.

rows.note: no change expected until LB campaign
natural decay; no new RDs acquired yet

prose.title: What two months bought us.
paragraphs: April and May closed out Month 1 of the engagement: Tasks 1–7 shipped the technical foundation (title tags, meta descriptions, H1s, internal/external link fixes, ALT attributes, robots.txt). May added content work (Tasks 14, 15, 16, 17 — thin-page rewrites, duplicate content fix, two SEO articles).

June 4 was the AI Search deploy. Task 18 went live across 8 commercial pages — visible FAQ accordions plus FAQPage JSON-LD, paired with Yoast Organization graph enrichment (CMA licences 20200000144 + 20200000223, DED 561501, FinancialService @type, 8 awards, GCC areaServed). Homepage broadcasts a SpeakableSpecification targeting the H1 and FAQ Q&As. This is the technical lever for AI Overview eligibility once Google reindexes.

Referring domains slipped 13% (608 → 529) and backlinks 5% (5.1K → 4.8K) — that's natural decay, not lost wins. The link-building work hasn't started yet. Authority Score sits at 8 and won't move until chapter 06's link-building plan executes. The next meaningful re-measurement is July 1, when the 28-day reindex window closes on the FAQ schema.

pull_quote.text: Technical foundation cleared. AI Search readiness deployed. Authority lift is the next-cycle priority.
